name: mor-duongmh
description: Mor's Claude Code plugin marketplace — spec-driven workflows + vendored Superpowers + deep code review + BrSE document generation.

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Mor's spec-driven workflow with superpowers-driven schema. Artifacts are TDD-ready and consumable by Superpowers executing-plans and subagent-driven-development.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Mor's vendored fork of obra/superpowers — same skills as upstream, pinned and synced via script. Replaces upstream superpowers@obra in this marketplace.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Multi-language deep code review agent: risk · security · design pattern · test coverage · convention. Powered by code-review-graph MCP. Honors project CLAUDE.md as the highest source of truth.

plugins.name: docs-hero
plugins.description: BrSE document generation suite (SRS + API + DB) for ITO Japan offshore. Init/update/sync with conflict-minimal diff engine. Synergizes with spec plugin: /spec:propose → /docs-hero:update --from-openspec.
